title: BC-Bench Dataset Schema
description: Schema for Business Central benchmark dataset instances

repo.description: The repository owner/name identifier from GitHub or microsoftInternal

instance_id.description: A formatted instance identifier, usually as repo_owner__repo_name-PRnumber

patch.description: The gold patch, the patch generated by the PR (minus test-related code), that resolved the issue

base_commit.description: The commit hash of the repository representing the HEAD of the repository before the solution PR is applied

hints_text.description: Comments made on the issue prior to the creation of the solution PR's first commit creation date

created_at.description: The creation date of the pull request

test_patch.description: A test-file patch that was contributed by the solution PR

version.description: Installation version to use for running evaluation

environment_setup_version.description: The latest minor version that doesn't include the fix, BC Artifact version to setup the environment

FAIL_TO_PASS.description: A json list of test entries representing the set of tests resolved by the PR and tied to the issue resolution

codeunitID.description: The ID of the test codeunit

functionName.description: List of test function names within the codeunit

PASS_TO_PASS.description: A json list of strings that represent tests that should pass before and after the PR application

codeunitID.description: The ID of the test codeunit

functionName.description: List of test function names within the codeunit

project_paths.description: List of repository-relative directories containing app.json for affected projects
